'''âth-w-h''' ('''kathawah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eddy|eddy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eddy|eddy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-w-h
|-
! Lemma
| kathawah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithawah|thithawah]] || [[word:jithawah|jithawah]] || [[word:shithawah|shithawah]] || [[word:kithawah|kithawah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthawah|thuthuthawah]] || [[word:jujuthawah|jujuthawah]] || [[word:shushuthawah|shushuthawah]] || [[word:kukuthawah|kukuthawah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthawah|thuthawah]] || [[word:juthawah|juthawah]] || [[word:shuthawah|shuthawah]] || [[word:kuthawah|kuthawah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthawah|thuthawah]] || [[word:juthawah|juthawah]] || [[word:shuthawah|shuthawah]] || [[word:kuthawah|kuthawah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethawah|thethawah]] || [[word:jethawah|jethawah]] || [[word:shethawah|shethawah]] || [[word:kethawah|kethawah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothawah|thothothawah]] || [[word:jojothawah|jojothawah]] || [[word:shoshothawah|shoshothawah]] || [[word:kokothawah|kokothawah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothawah|thothawah]] || [[word:jothawah|jothawah]] || [[word:shothawah|shothawah]] || [[word:kothawah|kothawah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothawah|thothawah]] || [[word:jothawah|jothawah]] || [[word:shothawah|shothawah]] || [[word:kothawah|kothawah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthawah|thĂŠthawah]] || [[word:jĂŠthawah|jĂŠthawah]] || [[word:shĂŠthawah|shĂŠthawah]] || [[word:kĂŠthawah|kĂŠthawah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathawah|thathathawah]] || [[word:jajathawah|jajathawah]] || [[word:shashathawah|shashathawah]] || [[word:kakathawah|kakathawah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathawah|thathawah]] || [[word:jathawah|jathawah]] || [[word:shathawah|shathawah]] || [[word:kathawah|kathawah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathawah|thathawah]] || [[word:jathawah|jathawah]] || [[word:shathawah|shathawah]] || [[word:kathawah|kathawah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathawah|shathawah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathawah|goshathawah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathawah|gokishathawah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathawahnĂŒ|shathawahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathawahnknĂŒ|goshathawahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathawahnĂŒ|gokishathawahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathawahshĂ«|shathawahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathawahnkshĂ«|goshathawahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathawahshĂ«|gokishathawahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathawahro|shathawahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathawahnkro|goshathawahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathawahro|gokishathawahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathawahmu|shathawahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathawahnkmu|goshathawahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathawahmu|gokishathawahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathawahsher|shathawahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathawahnksher|goshathawahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathawahsher|gokishathawahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathawahng|shathawahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathawahnkng|goshathawahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathawahng|gokishathawahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathawahya|shathawahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathawahnkya|goshathawahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathawahya|gokishathawahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathawahyam|shathawahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathawahnkyam|goshathawahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathawahyam|gokishathawahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathawahnĂŒshĂ«|shathawahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathawahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathawahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathawahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathawahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathawahnĂŒro|shathawahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathawahnknĂŒro|goshathawahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathawahnĂŒro|gokishathawahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathawahnĂŒmu|shathawahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathawahnknĂŒmu|goshathawahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathawahnĂŒmu|gokishathawahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathawahshĂ«nĂŒ|shathawahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathawahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathawahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathawahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathawahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathawahshĂ«ro|shathawahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathawahnkshĂ«ro|goshathawahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathawahshĂ«ro|gokishathawahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathawahshĂ«mu|shathawahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathawahnkshĂ«mu|goshathawahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathawahshĂ«mu|gokishathawahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathawahronĂŒ|shathawahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathawahnkronĂŒ|goshathawahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathawahronĂŒ|gokishathawahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathawahroshĂ«|shathawahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathawahnkroshĂ«|goshathawahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathawahroshĂ«|gokishathawahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathawahromu|shathawahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathawahnkromu|goshathawahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathawahromu|gokishathawahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathawahmunĂŒ|shathawahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathawahnkmunĂŒ|goshathawahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathawahmunĂŒ|gokishathawahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathawahmushĂ«|shathawahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathawahnkmushĂ«|goshathawahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathawahmushĂ«|gokishathawahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathawahmuro|shathawahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathawahnkmuro|goshathawahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathawahmuro|gokishathawahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
